title: nOps MAP Migration Project
description: A MAP Migration project represents an AWS Migration Acceleration Program engagement signed by the customer with AWS, tracking the overall migration effort.

id.description: The unique identifier of the MAP Migration project.

name.description: The name of the MAP Migration project.

status.description: The current status of the project.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.
